info.name: Gateway API (Unified)
info.description: Unified collection routing all requests through the API Gateway (http://localhost:5000). Use this collection for integration testing and production-like flows. For direct per-service testing use the individual service collections.

item.name: AI
item.description: All AI routes go through the gateway with /api/v1/ai/ prefix. YARP transforms them to /api/v1/ before forwarding to the AI service on port 5008.
